original_prompt: 给这个产品做一张详情页，要求一个欧洲模特手捧着这套首饰，正对镜头。
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
"A high-end lifestyle photography shot for a jewelry product detail page. A stunning European female model is facing the camera directly, her expression soft and romantic. She is gently holding the [Subject Lock: silver crystal jewelry set including the baroque tiara, V-shape necklace, and drop earrings] in her cupped hands, lifting them slightly towards the lens to present them. The jewelry sparkles intensely under soft, cinematic studio lighting, highlighting the pear-shaped and marquise-cut rhinestones. She wears a white off-shoulder wedding gown. The background is a soft, creamy bokeh of a luxury bridal dressing room, focusing entirely on the model and the sparkling jewelry."

[Text & UI Layout]
"***Layout Style**: Elegant Center Focus (视觉聚焦排版).
Text Rendering Instructions:
1. **Mood Title**: Content: “为爱加冕” (Crowning for Love). Style: [Sophisticated Serif, Silver or Champagne Gold Gradient]. Position: [Centered at the bottom over the blurred dress area].
2. **Description**: Content: “闪耀你的高光时刻” (Shine in your highlight moment). Style: [Minimalist Sans-serif, widely spaced]. Position: [Below the main title]."
layout_logic: 建议采用中心构图，模特手捧珠宝位于画面中轴线，利用大光圈虚化背景和模特的手臂边缘，将视觉焦点完全集中在模特手中的这套首饰上。文字信息建议放置在底部婚纱的虚化区域或顶部背景留白处，避免遮挡珠宝主体。
